items.title: How Trump assassination attempts played into his decision to attack Iran
items.description: President Donald Trump acknowledged for the first time a personal rationale for attacking Iran: “I got him before he got me.”

items.title: Supreme Court sides with Christian parents in battle over school trans policies
items.description: At issue is a California law prohibiting school policies that require employees to report students’ sexual orientation and gender identity to parents.
